title: Weather forecast for Monday 2 December
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest weather forecast from the South African Weather Service, no weather warnings have been issued for the Garden Route or Karoo.


> Fire danger warnings


Extremely high fire danger conditions are expected over the northern parts of the Northern Cape, the northern and eastern parts of the Free State, North West, the southern parts of Gauteng and the south-western Bushveld of Limpopo.


> Advisories


1. A heat wave with persistently high temperatures is expected over the central and south-eastern parts of the North West and the northern parts of the Free State until Wednesday, 4 December, and the north-western parts of KwaZulu-Natal, north-eastern parts of the North West, Gauteng, Limpopo and Mpumalanga until at least Friday 6 December.

2. Extremely hot and uncomfortable conditions are expected in the Lowveld of both Limpopo and Mpumalanga, the Valley and Bushveld of Limpopo and the northern parts of Gauteng on Wednesday, 4 December.

PretoriaFine, becoming partly cloudy from the afternoon.Minimum/Maximum:17/35The expected UVB Sunburn Index: Very High

Johannesburg

Fine, becoming partly cloudy from the afternoon.

Minimum/Maximum:15/32

VereenigingFine, becoming partly cloudy from the afternoon.Minimum/Maximum:15/33

MbombelaPartly cloudy with isolated showers and thundershowers from the afternoon. Minimum/Maximum:16/30

Polokwane

Fine, becoming partly cloudy from the afternoon.

Minimum/Maximum:17/31

MahikengFine, becoming partly cloudy from the afternoon.Minimum/Maximum:15/35

Vryburg

Fine.

Minimum/Maximum:11/36

BloemfonteinFine.Minimum/Maximum:14/33

KimberleyFine.Minimum/Maximum:13/34

UpingtonFine.

Minimum/Maximum:15/36

Cape Town

Partly cloudy.

Wind: Light southerly in the morning, otherwise moderate south-westerly.

Minimum/Maximum:18/25

The expected UVB Sunburn Index: Extreme

George

Partly cloudy.

Wind: Light and variable.

Minimum/Maximum:13/24

Gqeberha

Cloudy with isolated showers and rain at first, otherwise partly cloudy.

Wind: Light to moderate south-westerly.

Minimum/Maximum:16/23

East London

Cloudy with scattered showers.

Wind: Light to moderate south-westerly, becoming south-easterly in the afternoon.

Minimum/Maximum:17/23

Durban

Cloudy with isolated showers.

Wind: Moderate to fresh north-easterly, becoming south-westerly in the afternoon.

Minimum/Maximum:20/26

The expected UVB Sunburn Index: Moderate

Richards BayCloudy with isolated showers.Wind: Moderate to fresh north-easterly.Minimum/Maximum:19/31

Pietermaritzburg

Cloudy with isolated showers and thundershowers.

Minimum/Maximum:15/24


> Expected temperatures on Monday:


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
